summary: Replaced computational-research planning with biological unit, control, allocation, batch, and pseudoreplication contracts.
Added biosafety and institutional wet-lab handoff boundaries without copying upstream text or scripts.
Retained only general gap and competing-explanation concepts in a clean-room implementation.
Replaced conference novelty scoring with biological falsifiability, predictions, discriminating tests, and safety gates.
Retained general estimand, power-assumption, and falsifier concepts without copying upstream expression.
Added Linxira-native dependence, missingness, multiplicity, diagnostics, sensitivity, and no-auto-test-selection contracts.
Retained general reproducible-search and coverage-reporting concepts without copying upstream bodies, scripts, templates, or query code.
Added Linxira-native controlled-vocabulary, privacy, screening-handoff, and research-web action contracts.
